title: Verify customer identity before portal access
user_story: As a delinquent customer, I want to verify my identity before viewing account details, so that my information is protected.
acceptance_criteria: Account details are hidden before successful verification; failed verification shows a support route; outcome is recorded.

title: Show support route after failed verification
user_story: As a customer who cannot complete verification, I want a clear support path, so that I know how to continue.
acceptance_criteria: Support guidance appears after failed verification; account details remain hidden; support request can be logged.

title: Display overdue account summary
user_story: As a verified customer, I want to see my overdue balance and account status, so that I understand what action is needed.
acceptance_criteria: Overdue amount and status are shown; data reflects latest available source; fallback message appears if data is unavailable.

title: Show eligible next actions
user_story: As a customer, I want to see only actions I can take, so that I am not confused by unavailable options.
acceptance_criteria: Displayed actions follow eligibility rules; unavailable actions are hidden or explained; next step choices are recorded if needed.

title: Capture promise to pay
user_story: As a customer, I want to submit a payment date and amount, so that I can confirm my intent without calling an agent.
business_value: Reduces manual handling and improves commitment capture
acceptance_criteria: Required fields are validated; confirmation is shown; promise details are stored for reporting and agent visibility.

title: Check payment-plan eligibility
user_story: As the system, I want to check whether an account is eligible for self-serve plan setup, so that unsupported cases are routed correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Eligibility rules run before plan options are shown; ineligible cases route to support; decision is recorded.

title: Show available payment-plan options
user_story: As an eligible customer, I want to review available plan options, so that I can choose a manageable repayment path.
acceptance_criteria: Only eligible options are shown; each option includes amount and frequency; customer can choose one option.

title: Route unsupported cases to agent queue
user_story: As the operations team, we want unsupported cases routed with context, so that customers do not fall between channels.
acceptance_criteria: Routing reason is captured; portal actions are attached to the case; correct queue is selected.

title: Show portal interaction history to agents
user_story: As an agent, I want to see what the customer did in the portal, so that I do not repeat work.
acceptance_criteria: Interaction history includes attempted actions and timestamps; routed cases show recent customer activity; data is readable when the case opens.

title: Capture self-serve completion and abandonment metrics
user_story: As an operations manager, I want to track completions and drop-off, so that I can measure portal impact.
acceptance_criteria: Metrics distinguish completed, abandoned, and routed journeys; journey type is visible; measures can be reviewed post-launch.

title: Record audit trail for key customer actions
user_story: As a compliance stakeholder, I want a timestamped record of customer actions, so that the bank can evidence what happened.
acceptance_criteria: Key actions are timestamped; case reference is stored; audit record supports retrieval.

title: Display plain-language unsupported outcome messaging
user_story: As a customer, I want clear messaging when I cannot complete a journey online, so that I understand what happens next.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported message explains next step; wording avoids blame; support route is visible.

title: Measure workload shift after launch
user_story: As the Head of Operations, I want baseline and post-launch workload measures, so that I can confirm whether admin effort has reduced.
acceptance_criteria: Baseline and target measures are defined; reporting source is agreed; result can be reviewed after rollout.

title: Confirm selected payment plan
user_story: As a customer, I want confirmation of my selected plan, so that I know what I agreed to.
acceptance_criteria: Confirmation includes plan summary and next steps; selected option is stored; outcome is available for agent visibility.

title: Define failure-safe handling for critical portal steps
user_story: As the delivery team, we want key error states defined, so that journeys fail safely and predictably.
acceptance_criteria: Failure states are documented for unavailable data and interrupted steps; fallback path exists for critical journeys; user messaging is defined.
